title: aspidium neriiforme
intro: Aspidium neriiforme, also known as maidenhair fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Aspidium, characterized by its delicate and lacy fronds. Traditionally, Aspidium neriiforme has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aspidium neriiforme include reducing fever, relieving headaches and coughs, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. Aspidium neriiforme is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be dried and used in herbal teas or tinctures.
